case_title: JENNINGS, KIRSTEN INGA et al VS KAMINKER, LENNY

docket_entries.description: KIRSTEN JENNINGS FILED SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR IN LIEU OF WILLAIM ROZAR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,873.51 FILED BY JENNINGS, KIRSTEN INGA NATHAN, AARON JAY AS TO DEFENDANT KAMINKER, LENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
OPTION, ISSUE SEPARATE PAYMENTS OF $861.06 PAYABLE TO EACH PLFT, OR PAY THE ENTIRE JUDGMENT JOINTLY TO EACH PLAINTIFF.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,923.61 AS TO DEFENDANT KAMINKER, LENNY
PLAINTIFF KIRSTEN JENNINGS FILED SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR IN LIEU OF GENE MAZE.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KAMINKER, LENNY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JENNINGS, KIRSTEN INGA NATHAN, AARON JAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAMINKER, LENNY $1,722.12 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,772.12, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE TENANTS OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES ARE COLLECTIVELY ENTITLED TO RECEIVE $2583.17 FROM THEIR SECURITY DEPOSIT, PLUS ACCRUED. THIS RESULTS IN RECORERY OF $861.06 TO EACH THREE C0-TENANTS. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES DUE TO PLFTS JENNING & NATHAN ONLY. TO SATISFY THE JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT MAY, AT DEFENDANTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
